MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Rhonda Aquilina. Jeffrey E. Margulies, Esq. appeared for PlaintiffPong Shee Wong and there being no appearance by Defendant, Bai Fu Li the matter is taken off the settlement conference calendar, request for jury trial is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
